name: Crime Cartography

release.mode: Hadi edits and approves the introduction and first remade test videos
release.next: Launch the introduction and website, then release one or two remade tests

community_editorial.before_activation: Collect feedback and use it to improve the harness and workflow
community_editorial.activation: 500 project subscribers plus enough relevant community feedback to operate responsibly

infrastructure.deployment: One private VPS for the harness and read-only mailbox worker
infrastructure.interface: Static website plus email-first project interaction
infrastructure.avoids_by_default: Hosted subscriber database, public portal, and recurring services until a concrete requirement appears
infrastructure.manager_rate_proposal: $42/hour for verified harness-manager work, with a future published monthly cap

current_milestone.label: Creator-led launch and public project design
current_milestone.next: Introduction and two human-approved pilot remakes
current_milestone.next_event: Live Q&A plus Project Update #2 after two approved pilots and 30 substantive contributions across at least three expertise lanes

roadmap.label: Public room and project subscription
roadmap.evidence: Project context, email request form, and canonical public discussions are available

roadmap.label: Introduction and first remade releases
roadmap.evidence: Introduction plus two dedicated-channel remakes receive human approval

roadmap.label: Live Q&A and Project Update #2
roadmap.evidence: Two approved pilots and 30 substantive contributions across at least three expertise lanes

roadmap.label: Capped email editorial cohort
roadmap.evidence: 500 project requests plus tested consent, privacy, scoring, appeals, and release controls

roadmap.label: More cities, comparisons, and formats
roadmap.evidence: Reliable sourcing, remake, human-review, correction, and release loop

roadmap.label: Effective governance and value distribution
roadmap.evidence: Sustainable operations, professional review, versioned terms, effective date, and participant consent

calls_to_participate: Comment on public drafts and remade test videos
Propose sourced historical context for charts
Help design the later editorial email workflow
Legal, tax, privacy, crime-data, journalism, accessibility, security, and reliability experts can challenge the relevant public review thread
